originalTitle: Worried about private credit? Stay away from this even riskier investment right now.
summary: Private equity funds own the same underperforming companies spooking the credit market — and their investors are in the crosshairs.
content: Private equity funds own the same underperforming companies spooking the credit market — and their investors are in the crosshairs.
chineseTitle: 担心私人信贷？现在就远离这种风险更大的投资。
chineseSummary: 私募股权基金拥有同样令信贷市场恐慌的表现不佳的公司，而它们的投资者也成为了众矢之的。
chineseContent: 私募股权基金拥有同样令信贷市场恐慌的表现不佳的公司，而它们的投资者也成为了众矢之的。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
